title: Samsaram
actors: N.T. Rama Rao, Akkineni Nageswara Rao, Lakshmirajyam
plot: A middle class government clerk Raghu (NTR), lives happily with his wife Manjula (Laxmirajyam) until his scheming mother Venkamma (Suryakantham), his sister Kamakshi (Balasaraswathi) and her cowardly husband (Venkatramiah) move in...
